type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report

comments.comment: Omitted by error in previous reports. Primary generator used is >600hp (i.e., >447kW) so USEPA AP-42 Chapter 3.4 (>600hp) emission factors used.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: It was determined that an incorrect emission factor had been used in previous years and that instead of SO2 being calculated, SOx was being calculated. Hydro One Remotes had been over reporting for this substance and this was corrected in 2021. Remotes has updated a procedure for how these substances are to be calculated.
